sources.name: ONS
sources.dataset: Deaths Related to Drug Poisoning, England and Wales

sources.name: OHID / NDTMS
sources.dataset: Adult Drug and Alcohol Statistics from the National Drug Treatment Monitoring System

metadata.methodology: Drug poisoning deaths from ONS registration data, covering deaths where drug poisoning was the underlying cause. Treatment numbers from NDTMS, covering adults in structured treatment for drug and/or alcohol misuse. Funding figures from OHID local authority public health allocations.
knownIssues: Drug poisoning death counts are based on registration year not occurrence year; some delay in recording
Treatment numbers may include some double-counting where individuals enter multiple treatment episodes in same year
2021 figure affected by pandemic-related disruption to treatment services and death registration delays
